name: 2×2 quadrant
when_to_use: 需要按两个维度把少量项目放进四象限并直观看相对位置时用它，适合 Eisenhower 优先级、BCG 组合、影响×投入和风险×概率。若需要精确坐标分析、趋势线或数百点探索，应改用散点图；只有四类计数时用分区卡片更简洁。
why_valuable: 四象限图最容易因轴方向、标签和点位夹取不一致而被误读；本模板明确标出高低端和轴名，把 0–100 坐标安全夹入绘图区，并用轻量象限色块与可悬停点标签同时保留分类和个体识别。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to place a small number of items into four quadrants along two dimensions and see their relative positions at a glance. It suits Eisenhower prioritization, BCG portfolios, impact versus effort, and risk versus probability. For precise coordinate analysis, trend lines, or exploration of hundreds of points, use a scatter plot instead; when you have only counts for four categories, partitioned cards are simpler.
en.why_valuable: Quadrant charts are easily misread when axis direction, labels, and point clamping are inconsistent. This template explicitly marks the low and high ends and axis names, safely clamps 0-100 coordinates into the plot area, and uses subtle quadrant colors plus hoverable point labels to preserve both category and item identity.

data_in.note: data.points contains coordinates from 0-100. x increases left to right and y increases bottom to top; out-of-range values are clamped to the boundary. quadrants has fixed order [top-left,top-right,bottom-left,bottom-right]. detail is used only as a local hover title and is not sent upstream. Point colors cycle through theme colors in input order.

schema.title?: string - chart title; displays "Priority matrix" when omitted
schema.xAxis?: {label?:string,low?:string,high?:string} - horizontal-axis name and left/right endpoint labels; defaults X axis / Low / High
schema.yAxis?: {label?:string,low?:string,high?:string} - vertical-axis name and bottom/top endpoint labels; defaults Y axis / Low / High
schema.points: {label:string,x:number,y:number,detail?:string}[] - points with x/y in 0-100; detail is a local hover description

spec.note: The plot area has a minimum desktop height of 440px and narrow-screen height of 390px; the outer wrapper grows automatically with content. Points use percentage coordinates without reading host dimensions, and no vh height is used.

data_in.note: data.points 是 0–100 坐标点；x 从左到右增大，y 从下到上增大，超界值夹到边界。quadrants 顺序固定为 [左上,右上,左下,右下]。detail 只作为本地悬停 title，不上行；点色按输入顺序循环使用主题色。

schema.title?: string —— 图标题；省略时显示 “Priority matrix”
schema.xAxis?: {label?:string,low?:string,high?:string} —— 横轴名称与左右端标签；默认 X axis / Low / High
schema.yAxis?: {label?:string,low?:string,high?:string} —— 纵轴名称与下上端标签；默认 Y axis / Low / High
schema.quadrants?: string[4] —— [左上,右上,左下,右下] 的象限标题
schema.points: {label:string,x:number,y:number,detail?:string}[] —— 点位；x/y 使用 0–100，detail 是本地悬停说明

spec.note: 绘图区桌面最小高 440px，窄屏 390px，外层随内容自动增高；点位使用百分比坐标，不读取宿主尺寸，无 vh 高度。

example._why: 真实的产品路线图条目覆盖四个象限与轴中线附近，能验证坐标方向、边缘夹取、象限标签、点标签和悬停说明。

points.label: Faster search
points.detail: High impact and relatively low engineering effort

points.label: Mobile offline
points.detail: Important but requires a large platform investment

points.label: Legacy export
points.detail: Limited demand with significant maintenance cost

uplink: none: 纯展示组件；所有悬停、滚动、原生链接或其他局部交互都只发生在自有 shadow 内，不向 AI 或宿主回传数据。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
